executive_summary: SONEC's grid operated stably on January 31st with a healthy 25% reserve margin (62 MW) and peak demand of 248 MW well within available capacity of 310 MW. The system experienced one unplanned outage lasting 56 minutes, resulting in 658.4 MWh of estimated losses.
operations_summary: Grid losses increased to 12.67%, above recent levels, while renewable generation contributed 5.28% of total output with solar at 229.3 MWh and battery storage at 45.2 MWh. All generators remain in service with the system showing stable operational conditions despite elevated transmission losses.
